# License — Preline UI

**License**: **Dual: MIT + "Preline UI Fair Use License"**
**Copyright**: (c) 2026 Preline Labs Ltd.
**Upstream LICENSE**: https://github.com/htmlstreamofficial/preline/blob/main/LICENSE
**Provenance**: shallow clone of `htmlstreamofficial/preline` performed 2026-04-21.

**Important**: Preline UI is NOT pure MIT. The LICENSE file declares dual licensing:
> "Preline UI is free for both personal and commercial projects, released under dual license terms 'MIT' and 'Preline UI Fair Use License', and copyrighted 2026 by Preline Labs Ltd."

The MIT portion covers standard usage. The Fair Use portion restricts certain patterns (e.g. redistributing Preline as a competing component library, reselling the kit). For **internal reference / stitching into a non-competing product** this is fine — we are not redistributing Preline as a UI library. If any Preline code is copied verbatim into a shipped Clawmachine artefact and that artefact is distributed, re-read the full LICENSE to confirm Fair Use terms aren't triggered.

Full upstream LICENSE text retained at `external/preline-ui/LICENSE`.
